🌴 Eddie is wandering... tap to take over
Ahoy! I'm marooned on Lea Island. Help me fish, gather, and build my way to a rescue! Fill the 🛟 rescue meter — and rack up Captain Score for REAL Salt & Sound coupons (🏆 button)!
Keep an eye on the island — crabs, shells, coconuts, and buried surprises show up when you least expect them.
